tweets.author: blockchainreport.bsky.social
tweets.text:
Thailand busted illegal Bitcoin mining ops in 5 NE provinces, seizing 315 rigs. Authorities found meter tampering & illegal power connections. Estimated losses: ~ $1.24M, including $165K in fines & $1.07M unpaid bills. Investigations continue.

#crypto #blockchain #news
